testsuite.name: com.melodypharmacy.repository.UserSongRepositoryTest

testcase.name: 이미 저장된 노래 존재 여부 확인

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-28T00:52:47.212+09:00 INFO 39412 --- [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.melodypharmacy.repository.UserSongRepositoryTest]: UserSongRepositoryTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-28T00:52:47.237+09:00 INFO 39412 --- [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.melodypharmacy.MelodyPharmacyApplication for test class com.melodypharmacy.repository.UserSongRepositoryTest Hibernate: select us1_0.id, us1_0.concept_id, us1_0.created_at, us1_0.situation_id, us1_0.song_id, us1_0.user_id from user_songs us1_0 Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.artist, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.thumbnail_url, s1_0.title, s1_0.youtube_url from songs s1_0 Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.nickname, u1_0.password from users u1_0 Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.icon, s1_0.name from situations s1_0 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.icon, c1_0.name from concepts c1_0 Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, nickname, password) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into songs (artist, created_at, thumbnail_url, title, youtube_url) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into situations (icon, name) values (?, ?)
